pom.xml.general_idea: Remove explicit jakarta.annotation-api dependency as it is now provided by the JDK or Spring Boot starter.
pom.xml.why_exists: Explicitly declaring this dependency can cause version conflicts or is redundant in modern Spring Boot setups.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update validation-api version to remove .Final suffix, aligning with standard Jakarta EE versioning.
pom.xml.why_exists: The old version string might not resolve correctly in newer repositories or dependency trees.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-checkstyle-plugin to a newer snapshot version.
pom.xml.why_exists: Ensures compatibility with newer Java syntax and checkstyle rules.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-failsafe-plugin to a newer snapshot version.
pom.xml.why_exists: Ensures integration tests run correctly with Java 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-surefire-plugin to a newer snapshot version.
pom.xml.why_exists: Ensures unit tests run correctly with Java 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-war-plugin to a newer snapshot version.
pom.xml.why_exists: Ensures WAR packaging works correctly with newer dependencies.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace string concatenation with a text block for the log message format string.
Replace String.format with the String.formatted method introduced in Java 15 for cleaner string interpolation.
Add the @Serial annotation to the serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 17+ serialization best practices and suppress warnings.

src/test/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove unused static import of java.lang.String.format
Replace String.format call with String.formatted method
